Screen.Name: test-screen
Screen.script:
self:updateLayout(self.Width, self.Height) assert(self.Name == "test-screen", "Expected screen name to be test-screen") assert(self.Width == 1000, "Expected width to be 1000") assert(self.Height == 1000, "Expected height to be 1000")
local grid = self:findChild("test-grid", true) local inner = self:findChild("inner-stack", true) assert(grid ~= nil, "test-grid should exist") assert(inner ~= nil, "inner-stack should exist") assert(inner.ActualHeight == 100, string.format("inner-stack height should be 100, got %d", inner.ActualHeight)) assert(grid.ActualHeight == inner.ActualHeight, string.format("grid height (%d) should match inner-stack height (%d)", grid.ActualHeight, inner.ActualHeight)) assert(grid.ActualHeight > 0, string.format("grid height should be > 0, got %d", grid.ActualHeight))
local metric = self:findChild("metric-users", true) local mtext = self:findChild("metric-text", true) assert(metric ~= nil, "metric-users should exist") assert(mtext ~= nil, "metric-text should exist") assert(mtext.ActualHeight > 0, "TextBlock inside Node2D should have positive height") assert(metric.ActualHeight == mtext.ActualHeight + 40, string.format("metric-users height (%d) should equal text height (%d) + 40 padding", metric.ActualHeight, mtext.ActualHeight))
